top_signals.title: Crude Oil Shipments Through Hormuz at Reach Highest Level Since Start of War
top_signals.summary: Crude shipments through the Strait of Hormuz rose this week to their highest level since the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran began in February after a ceasefire deal reopened the waterway, data showed on Thursday.Concerns about how long the strait would stay open also boosted trade.Still…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chipmakers Rally With Traders Piling In After Micron Results
top_signals.summary: Semiconductor stocks surged on Thursday as Micron Technology Inc.’s strong results underscored how artificial intelligence remains a major vector for growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: French Navy Seizes Tanker Linked to Russian Shadow Fleet
top_signals.summary: France's navy seized another tanker it said was linked to Russia's "shadow fleet" on Thursday, underscoring the escalation this year in European efforts to enforce sanctions and squeeze one of Moscow’s main revenue streams.Nine suspected shadow fleet tankers…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New macOS malware embeds fake errors to confuse AI analysis tools
top_signals.summary: A newly discovered macOS malware dubbed "Gaslight" is designed to confuse AI-assisted malware analysis tools by hiding prompt injection strings and fake debugging data within the executable. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Snow polo, honeypots and private jets: banks race to woo the wealthy
top_signals.summary: Private lenders jostle to win UK’s rich customers who demand more than the traditional branded cheque book and pen

top_signals.title: Venezuelan earthquakes leave hundreds dead and injured
top_signals.summary: Acting president Delcy Rodríguez says 164 confirmed dead but toll is likely to rise sharply
